gt_sql: SELECT SUM(IIF(T1.DisplayName = 'Mornington', T3.ViewCount, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T1.DisplayName = 'Amos', T3.ViewCount, 0)) AS diff FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.PostId
pred_sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.ViewCount), 0) 
     FROM posts p
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
     WHERE TRIM(u.DisplayName) = 'Mornington') 
    - 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.ViewCount), 0) 
     FROM posts p
     JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
     WHERE TRIM(u.DisplayName) = 'Amos') AS diff;
question: Calculate the difference in view count from post posted by Mornington and view count from posts posted by Amos.
